summary: Frontend testing complete for separated status model refactoring. All 13 test cases passed. New status model correctly displays: 1) Start Status (Ready to Work/Supervised Start Only/Not Ready), 2) Recruitment File (Incomplete/Complete), 3) Policies (No Policies/Assigned/Acknowledged), 4) Overall Compliance %. Categories restructured to Legal & Safety, Core Training, Competency & Health, Recruitment Record. Priority badges working: red 'Required', orange 'Health', blue 'Recruitment'. Data synchronization verified between Overview and What's Needed tabs.
passed_tests: ✅ Employees list has 'Start Status' column - SUCCESS
✅ Start Status filter dropdown has options: Ready to Work, Supervised Start Only, Not Ready - SUCCESS
✅ Olakunle Alonge profile loads correctly - SUCCESS
✅ Overview tab shows three status cards: Start Status, Recruitment File, Policies - SUCCESS
✅ Olakunle shows 'Start Status: Ready to Work' (green) - SUCCESS
✅ Olakunle shows 'Recruitment File: Incomplete' status - SUCCESS
✅ What's Needed tab shows Start Status panel with overall compliance % - SUCCESS
✅ Priority badges visible: red 'Required', orange 'Health', blue 'Recruitment' - SUCCESS
✅ Lawrence Egbeni profile shows 'Start Status: Not Ready' - SUCCESS
✅ Lawrence shows missing blockers listed (6 items) - SUCCESS
✅ Synchronization verified: Overview and What's Needed show same data - SUCCESS
✅ Overall Compliance percentage displayed correctly (Olakunle: 52%, Lawrence: 17%) - SUCCESS
seed_data_creation: Used existing data - Olakunle Alonge (OCS-0001, ID: d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77) is Ready to Work with 52% compliance, Lawrence Egbeni (OCS-0002, ID: ccfcbdbb-feda-4043-a8b2-2f1f9da88bdf) is Not Ready with 17% compliance and 0/8 start items verified
context_for_next_testing_agent: Separated status model fully implemented and tested. Key features verified: (1) Three status cards in Overview: Start Status, Recruitment File, Policies, (2) Start Status filter dropdown on Employees list with options: Ready to Work, Supervised Start Only, Not Ready, (3) What's Needed tab shows Start Status panel with overall compliance %, (4) Priority badges: red 'Required' for start_required items, orange 'Health' for supervised_start items, blue 'Recruitment' for recruitment items, (5) Missing blockers displayed for Not Ready employees, (6) Data synchronization between Overview and What's Needed tabs confirmed. Employee IDs: Olakunle=d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77 (Ready to Work, 52%), Lawrence=ccfcbdbb-feda-4043-a8b2-2f1f9da88bdf (Not Ready, 17%).
